title: A Romance of the Little Forest
overview: A story following a botany professor focusing only on research and does not care for fame, money, or love. Meeting a girl he had ill feelings with in the past, their interest in one another develops as she shows off her doctorate knowledge in ornithology.

tv.showTitle: A Romance of the Little Forest
tv.episodeTitle: This Pursuing Yu Plan Didn't Really Work
tv.episodeOverview: Mei Ren feels shocked when she finds out that Zhuang Yu is actually the president of Jiantao Group during the charity event. Later, Mei Ren's parents call her and ask her and Zhuang Yu to go home for the Mid-Autumn Festival. Surprisingly, Gou Fei comes to the village to make a scene.
